report.summary: Day 72 standup v3: Delta since v2 — build-v2 shipped 2 more guides (Solana Liquid Staking + Corporate Crypto Treasury) with interactive LST calculator. 5 ecosystem pages promoted (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Yearn, Ondo). Published slugs now 513 (494 unique). BTC holding ~$70.3K, ETH ~$2,166. F&G Index at 8-11 range (Extreme Fear Day ~50). Git locks persist Day 10 — deploy gap widened to ~170+ pages (791 uncommitted files). Today's spend: $1,039 human-equivalent (14 agent runs across 2 full cycles + this standup). P0 remains git lock clearance.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v2: Full second cycle completed — all 6 agents ran again. Build-v2 shipped Solana Liquid Staking Guide + Corporate Crypto Treasury Guide with interactive SolanaLSTCalculator component. Publish-v2 promoted 5 ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Yearn, Ondo). Design-v2 created 2 OG images + 5 UX fixes (breadcrumbs, OG metadata, input accessibility). Community-v2 drafted 3 more social posts (#116-118) + 2 SVG cards + content calendar v29. EOD-v2 confirmed QA pass.

MARKET UPDATE (fresh): BTC ~$70,335-$71,043 (holding recovery from weekend $68K dip). ETH ~$2,166 (+$25 from v2). F&G Index: 8-11 range (Extreme Fear — Day ~50, record streak extending). Total market cap: $2.44-$2.50T. BTC turning positive in March after two months of losses.

NEWS: House Financial Services Committee tokenization hearing today — $26.48B RWA market, 2 bills introduced (Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act + Capital Markets Technology Modernization Act). CLARITY Act stablecoin yield 99% resolved but Senate Republicans attaching community bank deregulation. Bitmine (BMNR) bought 65,341 ETH ($138M) betting on slump ending. Humanity (H) unlocking $10.1M tokens today. Casper hard fork this week.
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE at 0 — drained in v1 cycle. 67 ecosystem pages still available in unpublished inventory for next promote cycle.
LOCAL METRICS: 1,156 page.tsx files (+2 from v2). 513 published slugs (494 unique after dedup, +7 from v2). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages (last commit e999560, Mar 17). 791 uncommitted files.
EGRESS: Web search working — market data fresh as of this cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v2: Build-v2 shipped Solana Liquid Staking Guide 2026 (~2,800 words, 7 sections, interactive LST calculator) + Corporate Crypto Treasury Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, 8 sections). Publish-v2 promoted 5 ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Yearn, Ondo). Design-v2 created 2 OG images + fixed 5 UX issues (breadcrumbs, OG metadata, input accessibility, mobile touch targets, aria labels). Community-v2 drafted 3 social posts (#116-118), 2 SVG cards, content calendar v29, newsletter v23 addendum. EOD-v2 confirmed QA pass on all new pages.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE empty — next build will refill. 513 entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES (494 unique). 1,156 page.tsx files. Today's total output across 2 full cycles: 4 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, 5 OG images, 9 social posts, 5 SVG cards, 2 newsletters, 9 UX fixes, 1 interactive component.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 494 unique published slugs. ~338 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages (35% unreachable).

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) confirmed still present. 791 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.

BLOCKER [P1]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx (up from 56 — recount revealed Day 1 pillar pages never scaffolded: 18 wallets, 8 taxes, 19 investing/best, 19 learn fundamentals, /compare/exchanges).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 46 TS errors across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts) — JSX escaping issues.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes (rate-limiter.ts exists but not wired).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 19 duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (513 entries but only 494 unique).
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×3, build×2, design×2, community×2, publish×2, eod×2 = 13 total (+ this standup = 14).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): Deploy gap widened to ~170+ pages. BTC holding $70K+ and market stabilizing — if this is a sentiment floor, our 494 published slugs need to be live for Google indexing. One manual intervention unlocks a 50%+ content increase instantly. Every additional day compounds lost organic traffic opportunity. This remains the single highest-ROI action available.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD MISSING DAY 1 PILLAR PAGES: 103 published slugs have no page.tsx — these are core pillar pages (wallets, tax guides, investing/best, learn fundamentals). Scaffolding these fills critical SEO gaps. Tax pages especially urgent with April 15 deadline now 21 days away. Recommend next build cycle focuses on batch-scaffolding the 8 missing tax pages + Tax-Loss Harvesting tool.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON TOKENIZATION HEARING: Congress holding dedicated tokenization hearing TODAY — 2 bills introduced, $26.48B RWA market. Our tokenized-real-world-assets-guide is perfectly positioned. Community has 3 posts ready (#116-118) targeting this narrative. Push social content while hearing is live. Also: Bitmine's $138M ETH purchase signals institutional confidence — whale tracker content timely.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Market showing stabilization (BTC positive in March, F&G slowly ticking up from 8 to 11). Two full build cycles completed today producing 4 guides + 1 interactive tool + 5 ecosystem pages. Output velocity is high but all trapped behind git locks. Agent spend today: $1,039 human-equivalent across 14 runs — all accumulating locally. Deploy unblocks ~$5K+ of accumulated content value.
